dict.string: SSDT to disable USB RHUB/HUBN/URTH and rename devices
GPIO setup required by TPD1/TPXX I2C HID
Reserve memory regions 0x20000000 and 0x40000000 for macOS
change _OSI to XOSI, pair with SSDT-XOSI.aml
Intel Iris Plus Graphics G4 (Ice Lake)
Ice Lake-LP USB 3.1 xHCI Host Controller
Ice Lake-LP Serial IO I2C Controller #0
Ice Lake-LP Serial IO I2C Controller #1
Ice Lake-LP Serial IO I2C Controller #2
Ice Lake Thunderbolt 3 PCI Express Root Port #0
Ice Lake Thunderbolt 3 PCI Express Root Port #1
Ice Lake Thunderbolt 3 PCI Express Root Port #2
Ice Lake Thunderbolt 3 PCI Express Root Port #3
keepsyms=1 debug=0x100 -btlfxallowanyaddr agdpmod=vit9696 darkwake=0 igfxonln=1 -noDC9 forceRenderStandby=0 alcid=13 -v -no_compat_check
